title: Creative Confidence
subtitle: Unleashing the Creative Potential Within Us All
author: Tom Kelley
themes: Everyone is creative — the myth of the 'creative type'
Design thinking as a practical creative methodology
Overcoming fear of judgment and creative anxiety
From creative confidence to organizational innovation
awards: New York Times and Wall Street Journal Bestseller
One of Amazon's Best Business Books of 2013
Inc. Magazine's Best Business Books of the Year
excerpt: Too many people believe creativity is a gift for the chosen few. Tom and David Kelley show that creativity is a muscle that can be strengthened — and the key to unlocking it is creative confidence.
